subject: An anime-style young humanoid figure with swept hair and goggles, in a white and gold layered coat, channeling a glowing blue crystalline energy orb — Layle from Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles: The Crystal Bearers
suspected_ip: Layle (Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles: The Crystal Bearers)
description: An anime-style young figure stands with one hand outstretched, channeling a swirling blue crystalline orb of energy. The figure wears a white and gold layered coat with dark trim and mechanical/steampunk-styled goggles pushed up onto the forehead. The overall design features warm gold and cream colors contrasted with the vivid blue of the energy in the hand. A ghosted close-up of the figure's face appears behind in the upper right corner. Card type is 'Backup / Crystal Bearer' and the source game is labeled 'DFF / FFCC.' The name Layle is printed on the card.
foreground: Young figure in white-gold coat with goggles, channeling a glowing blue orb
background: Pale neutral gradient with ghosted portrait close-up
emotion: confident, focused — outstretched hand directing energy, calm expression
